description:
Debug Network Faster & Smarter with Proxyman

Proxyman is a high-performance Windows app, which enables developers to capture, inspect, and manipulate HTTP/HTTPS requests/responses with ease.
✨ Features
- Scripting before Breakpoint: Scripts can now run before a request pauses at a breakpoint.
- Flow colors: Added more highlight colors for flows.

🐞 Bugs
- Fixed: System proxy does not revert after quitting the app. As a result, some apps may not be able to connect to the internet.
- Fixed: Some devices could get the wrong UUID.
